log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Aarakocra — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: 41/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
